project: CI/CD Pipeline Overhaul — Ship PRs With Confidence
description: Replace aspirational CI/CD with a working pipeline: PR quality gates, automated edge function deployment, changed-function detection, smoke tests, and PR status dashboard.

extractedRequirements: PR quality gate: lint + typecheck + build must block merge
Failing tests report but don't block merge (new, may be flaky)
Delete 63 stale failing tests, write better ones later
Changed-function detection: build _shared/ dependency graph, deploy only affected functions
Auto-deploy changed edge functions to staging on PR (--no-verify-jwt)
Auto-deploy changed edge functions to production on merge to main
Migration dry-run output posted as PR comment
Smoke tests after staging deployment (health + critical endpoints)
PR comment bot: summarizes lint, typecheck, build, tests, migrations, deployed functions
Extend security scanning to PRs targeting main (not just staging)
Edge function syntax validation (Deno check/lint) in CI
constraints: Use dorny/paths-filter (NOT tj-actions/changed-files — supply chain compromised)
487 edge functions — full deploy takes 10-15 min

parallelGroups.A: Cleanup + PR quality gate (CI-012, CI-001, CI-002, CI-006, CI-011)
parallelGroups.B: Edge function deploy pipeline (CI-003, CI-004, CI-005, CI-007, CI-013)

stories.title: Delete stale tests + aspirational workflows
acceptance: 6 failing test files deleted (QuickAdd, authUtils, session-persistence, LeadAnalyticsCard, fathomApiService, useVersionCheck)
deploy.yml deleted
memory-optimized-deploy.yml deleted
vitest run passes with 0 failures (44 files, 1091+ tests)
No workflow files reference non-existent Docker/K8s infrastructure

stories.title: PR Quality Gate — lint + typecheck + build
acceptance: New .github/workflows/pr-checks.yml triggers on pull_request to main and staging
Lint job runs npm run lint — BLOCKS merge on failure
Typecheck job runs npm run typecheck — BLOCKS merge on failure
Build job runs npm run build — BLOCKS merge on failure
All 3 jobs run in parallel with shared npm ci + cache setup
Uses actions/setup-node@v4 with Node 20 and npm cache

stories.title: Unit test job in CI (report-only, non-blocking)
acceptance: Unit test job added to pr-checks.yml — runs npm run test:run
Test job reports status but does NOT block merge (continue-on-error: true)
JUnit reporter configured for GitHub Actions test summary integration
Coverage uploaded as artifact (not to Codecov yet)
Test results visible in PR checks tab

stories.title: Changed edge function detection + _shared/ dependency graph
acceptance: scripts/detect-changed-functions.sh takes base branch as arg, outputs JSON list of function names
Scans git diff for changed files under supabase/functions/
If _shared/ file changed: traces which functions import it via grep, adds those to deploy list
Deduplicates output list
Handles edge case: if _shared/ file is imported by >100 functions, falls back to 'deploy all'
Tested locally with sample git diffs

stories.title: Auto-deploy changed functions to staging on PR
acceptance: New .github/workflows/deploy-functions.yml triggers on pull_request when supabase/functions/** changes
Uses dorny/paths-filter (pinned to commit SHA) to detect changes
Runs detect-changed-functions.sh to get deploy list
Deploys each function with --project-ref caerqjzvuerejfrdtygb --no-verify-jwt
Posts PR comment listing deployed functions
Concurrency group prevents parallel staging deploys
Uses SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN secret for auth

stories.title: Auto-deploy changed functions to production on merge
acceptance: deploy-functions.yml also triggers on push to main
Production deploy uses --project-ref ygdpgliavpxeugaajgrb WITHOUT --no-verify-jwt
Slack notification on success/failure (matching db-migrations.yml pattern)
Health endpoint check after deployment
Separate concurrency group from staging deploys

stories.title: Migration dry-run PR comments + destructive op warning
acceptance: db-migrations.yml enhanced: dry-run output posted as PR comment via github-script
Comment warns if DROP TABLE, DROP COLUMN, or ALTER TYPE detected in migration files
Comment updates on re-push (single comment, not spam)
Migration file naming validated: YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_description.sql format
Notification steps use continue-on-error: true to prevent false failures

stories.title: Smoke tests after staging deployment
acceptance: Smoke test job runs after staging deploy in deploy-functions.yml
Hits health endpoint and verifies 200 response
Hits 3-5 verify_jwt=false endpoints with known payloads
Reports pass/fail as PR comment update
Timeout: 60s per endpoint, 5 min total
Smoke test failures do NOT block merge (warning only)

stories.title: Replace playwriter with standard Playwright for CI
acceptance: playwright.config.ts updated: remove deprecated comment, configure headless Chromium
tests/fixtures/playwriter-setup.ts replaced with standard Playwright test fixtures
Auth setup uses Supabase test user (scripts/create-playwright-user.sql pattern)
3-5 critical E2E tests verified working: login, navigation, pipeline view, QuickAdd
Runs locally with npx playwright test
No dependency on Chrome extension or playwriter MCP

stories.title: E2E tests in CI against staging
acceptance: E2E job added to pr-checks.yml — runs after build succeeds
Starts Vite dev server with --mode staging env vars
Runs Playwright headless against localhost
Test artifacts (screenshots, traces) uploaded as GitHub Actions artifacts
E2E job does NOT block merge (continue-on-error: true)
Only runs 3-5 critical flow tests (not full suite)

stories.title: PR status dashboard comment (aggregate all checks)
acceptance: New job in pr-checks.yml runs after all other jobs complete (needs: [lint, typecheck, build, test, ...])
Posts single PR comment with table: check name | status | details
Includes: lint, typecheck, build, unit tests, migration dry-run, deployed functions, smoke tests
Uses actions/github-script to create or update comment (finds by marker comment)
Shows bundle size from build output
Updates on re-push (no comment spam)

stories.title: Landing page CI + extend security scan to main
acceptance: Landing page build job added to pr-checks.yml when packages/landing/** changes
Runs npm run build in packages/landing workspace
security-scan.yml triggers extended to include pull_request to main (not just staging)
Security scan results visible in PR checks

stories.title: Edge function Deno syntax validation in CI
acceptance: Deno lint/check job added to deploy-functions.yml for changed functions only
Uses denoland/setup-deno@v2 action
Runs deno check on each changed function's index.ts
Validates no unpinned esm.sh imports (grep for @supabase/supabase-js@2 without @2.43.4)
Reports syntax errors in PR comment
Non-blocking (warning only) — Deno check may have false positives with esm.sh

executionOrder.description: PR checks workflow + staging deploy (CI-001/002 need CI-012, CI-004 needs CI-003)
Production deploy + smoke tests (both need CI-004)
PR dashboard (needs CI-001, CI-002, CI-004, CI-006, CI-007)

githubScout.dbMigrationsSlackBroken: SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL secret empty — staging runs failing on notification step
